hero.title: Crafted Stone. Built to Last.
hero.subtitle: Premium tile and stone installation for residential and commercial projects. Over 20 years of hands-on craftsmanship.

services.heading: Our Services
services.subheading: From concept to completion, we handle every detail.

floor.title: Floor Tile
floor.desc: Porcelain, ceramic, travertine, and natural stone for kitchens, bathrooms, entryways, and outdoor spaces.

wall.title: Wall Tile & Showers
wall.desc: Custom shower surrounds, elegant backsplashes, and statement feature walls — precision-set and waterproofed.

stone.title: Stone Features
stone.desc: Countertops, fireplace surrounds, outdoor patios, and custom stonework that adds lasting value to any space.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your space?
cta.subtext: Get a no-obligation estimate. We serve the greater metro area.

1.quote: Mario's work on our master bath is absolutely flawless. The tile patterns are perfect and the whole process was seamless.
1.author: Jane D.

2.quote: On time, on budget, and beautifully done. Our new kitchen floor completely changed the feel of the home.
2.author: Roberto M.

3.quote: Professional, meticulous, and truly passionate about his craft. We couldn't be happier with our outdoor patio.
